title: PartOfSpeech
description: Configuration defining the metadata, inflectional features, and lexical attributes for a specific part of speech.

name.description: The name of the part of speech (e.g., noun, verb, adjective).

features.description: List of inflectional features relevant to this part of speech that are associated with morphological formatives.

invariant_features.description: Morphological features inherent to the word (e.g., inherent gender). These must correspond to columns in the lexicon CSV.

lexical_flags.description: Column names in the lexicon CSV used to signal special behavior, irregular inflection, or lexical classes.

principal_parts.description: Column names in the lexicon CSV that specify alternate stems for a root (e.g., present_stem, past_stem).
